name: Eaglesoft Dental Practice Management API
what_it_does: Eaglesoft Dental Practice Management REST API for dental office operations, patient management, and dental billing. Enables AI agents to manage patient record and appointment scheduling for dental practice workflow automation, handle dental billing and insurance claim submission for dental revenue cycle management, access clinical chart and treatment plan data for dental clinical workflow, retrieve dental X-ray and image management integration for digital dental records, manage insurance eligibility verification for dental benefits management, handle recall and preventive care management for patient engagement, access production reporting and practice analytics for dental business intelligence, retrieve treatment plan and case presentation for patient acceptance workflow, manage multi-location dental group operations for DSO management, and integrate Eaglesoft with Patterson Dental supply ordering and imaging systems.
use_cases: Automating dental appointment scheduling from practice management agents
Processing dental claims from billing agents
Managing dental patient recall from engagement agents
Reporting practice production from analytics agents
not_for: Non-dental healthcare practices without dental billing context
Large hospital systems without standalone dental practice focus
Practices using Dentrix or Curve Dental exclusively
best_when: A dental practice, dental group, or DSO using Eaglesoft wants AI agents to automate appointment scheduling, dental billing, treatment plan follow-up, and practice performance reporting.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHI RISK: Eaglesoft contains dental patient PHI including clinical chart data, X-rays, and insurance information — HIPAA BAA required for all integrations; dental PHI has the same protection requirements as medical PHI. Patterson Dental acquisition dependency — Patterson Companies acquired Eaglesoft; API access and integration may be restricted to Patterson-preferred partners. ADA dental billing coding — automated dental claim submission requires correct CDT code usage; incorrect CDT coding creates claim denial and potential dental insurance fraud exposure.

auth.notes: Eaglesoft uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON for partner integrations. Limited public developer documentation. St. Paul, Minnesota HQ (Patterson Companies). Patterson Companies (PDCO NASDAQ). Eaglesoft founded 1986. Patterson acquired Eaglesoft 2004. 30,000+ dental practices. Strong in general dentistry and DSO market. Competes with Dentrix (Henry Schein) and Open Dental for dental practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-operatory or per-practice subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-operatory subscription; DSO enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: St. Paul, MN. Patterson Companies (PDCO NASDAQ). Founded 1986. Patterson acquired 2004. 30,000+ dental practices. Competes with Dentrix (Henry Schein) for dental practice management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA DENTAL PHI: Eaglesoft contains dental patient PHI (clinical records, X-rays, insurance); HIPAA BAA required for all API integrations; dental PHI same protection requirements as general medical PHI under HIPAA

CDT coding accuracy — automated dental claim submission requires correct ADA CDT procedure codes; incorrect CDT code usage creates claim denial and potential dental insurance fraud; CDT codes updated annually by ADA
Patterson partner access restriction — Eaglesoft API access may be restricted to Patterson-preferred and approved partners; verify partner program requirements before integration development
No webhooks — dental appointment and billing event notification requires polling; no native push for appointment creation, claim status, or payment events

On-premises deployment — Eaglesoft is primarily an on-premises application; API integration requires network access to practice server; cloud-to-on-premises integration has firewall and VPN complexity

DSO multi-location complexity — dental group and DSO operations across multiple practice locations require per-location API authentication and data aggregation; no native multi-location consolidated API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Dental practice management. HIPAA. API key auth. US. Dental patient PHI.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dental practice. HIPAA. API key. US. Dental patient PHI.
